evidence_summary: [CH003_SC001] Purpose: Establish Dorothy's new status and the beginning of her journey.

[CH003_SC001] Summary: Dorothy changes into a clean gingham dress and discovers the silver shoes fit perfectly. She sets out on the Yellow Brick Road, passing prosperous Munchkin farms and receiving bows from locals.
[CH003_SC001] Emotional arc: From domestic preparation to a sense of wonder and curiosity.

[CH003_SC001] Coverage: Close-ups: The silver shoes, the gingham fabric. Wide shots: The colorful Munchkin landscape, the long stretch of the Yellow Brick Road. Tracking shots: Dorothy walking along the road.
[CH003_SC001] Continuity: The fit and appearance of the silver shoes; the cleanliness of the gingham dress.
